Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2005-2, A MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT by Setting Aside Dismissal is granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
